carry_forward: Focus: Dan talking about sector rotation:
Focus: every 4-5 days the big money pours into themes in the market, there's usually 1-3 hot ones and they change when the market is chopping like this. last week was Cybersecurity
Focus: how: watch tickers constantly, watch the sectors and industries

Focus: you can wait for the breakouts to start and then daytrade the trends or you can try to catch the breakout day by watching groups of charts that start compressing/tightening up for swing entries.
